about.title: DGJ Architects & Arkitecna
about.subtitle: A historical marine architectural and procurement company.
about.p1: Founded in Singapore in 1959, Arkitecna has spent over 74 years shaping spaces, specializing in hotel contracts, custom furniture production, FF&E (Furniture, Fixtures, and Equipment), and hospitality procurement.
about.p2: Across decades of international projects—from luxury yachts to Bali villas—we recognized the acute need for faster, more intelligent visualization and operational tools.
about.p3: From 2004 Arkitecna is delivering high-end Furniture and Fixtures to the leading hotel chains and luxury projects. Thanks to our experience in furniture design and production we deliver turn-key projects with highest grade of quality and durability and over the standard warranty time.
about.p4: We handle procurement projects with very transparent reporting and high grade of competence to find the right supplier for your project or, directly making all Furniture in our own facilities.

sustainability.title: Commitment to Sustainability
sustainability.t1_desc: Our core material is Indonesian Teak, globally renowned for its exceptional durability and water resistance. We are steadfast in our commitment to environmental stewardship. Every piece of teak used in UMA BALI furniture is 100% FSC Certified and accompanied by the official Government of Indonesia SVLK certificate (Sistem Verifikasi Legalitas Kayu), ensuring strict adherence to sustainable forestry practices and legality.
sustainability.t2_desc: Understanding teak quality is essential to evaluating outdoor furniture. Teak timber is universally classified into three grades based on the section of the log it originates from:
sustainability.grade3_desc: Originating from the outer sections of the log. It is pale in color, lacks natural oils, and is highly susceptible to rot, drastically reducing lifespan outdoors.
sustainability.grade2_desc: Sourced from the mid-section. Muted in color with uneven grain and partial oil content. It provides moderate durability but requires heavy maintenance.
sustainability.grade1_desc: The absolute core of a mature tree. Incredibly dense, rich in natural rubber and oils. It possesses an exquisite golden-brown hue and offers unparalleled resilience against extreme weathering.
sustainability.standard_desc: We refuse to compromise. UMA BALI exclusively utilizes Teak Grade 1. This ensures that your outdoor investments not only boast a flawless aesthetic out-of-the-box but are engineered to last generations with minimal degradation.

materials.title: Our Materials
materials.intro: At UMA BALI, the foundation of every collection rests upon the uncompromising quality of our materials. We embrace the natural beauty of solid Grade 1 Teak, manipulating its aesthetic profile to harmonise with diverse global architectures.
materials.varnish_desc: To ensure profound longevity, we utilize exclusively Golden Care premium varnishes and treatments. This industry-leading shield protects our carefully curated teak finishes from UV degradation, moisture, and extreme weathering, preserving unparalleled durability over standard market offerings.
materials.natural: Raw, beautifully sanded finish highlighting the pure organic grain.
materials.oiled: Deepened natural hues with a rich, protective oiled luster.
materials.honey: A warm, radiant golden tone bringing energetic brightness.
materials.weathered: A sophisticated, muted aesthetic mimicking natural aging.
materials.grey: An elegant, cool silver-grey tone perfect for modern architecture.
materials.wenge: A profound, dark espresso finish for striking luxury contrast.

ai.intro: Visualize UMA BALI furniture in your own environment. Configure your space, select products, and let our AI create a photorealistic rendering.
